min_doctor_qualification: MCh/DNB or Equivalent (in Urology, Pediatric surgery)
clinical_indications: Satisfactory solution, especially in the elderly
Also needed after urethrectomy and/or penectomy
Failure of previous reconstructive procedures, such as urethroplasty

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings and planned line of treatment
Retrograde urethrography (RGU)/ Micturating Cysto-urethrogram (MCU) confirming the diagnosis

clinical_key_pointers: Perineal urethrotomy is a surgical procedure usually performed for temporary urine diversion in patients with obstructive urinary outflow disease.
Creating a permanent opening into the urethra through an incision in the skin of the perineum.
Is the best option to restore urethral patency in case of urethral stricture disease.
PU allows the patient to resume normal voiding and is generally assumed to be the last option before abandoning the urethral outlet.
